---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(ncdf4)
library(tidyverse)
library(MyFunctions)
library(abind)
```


# Create function to convert monthly to yearly NetCDF

```{r}


monthly_to_yearly_nc <- function(
    base_dir,
    model, # ESM
    scenario, #SSP
    variable, #tos.o2, etc
    ensemble = "r1i1p1f1",
    resolution = "30arcmin",
    period = "2101_2300",
    units_override = NULL
) {
  
  # ---- Build file paths ----
  input_file <- file.path(
    base_dir, model, scenario,
    sprintf(
      "%s_%s_%s_%s_%s_global_monthly_%s.nc",
      model, ensemble, scenario, variable, resolution, period
    )
  )
  
  output_dir <- file.path(base_dir, model, scenario, "yearly")
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  output_file <- file.path(
    output_dir,
    sprintf(
      "%s_%s_%s_%s_%s_global_yearly_%s.nc",
      model, ensemble, scenario, variable, resolution, period
    )
  )
  
  if (!file.exists(input_file)) {
    stop("Input file not found:\n", input_file)
  }
  
  # ---- Open input ----
  
  ## Fix variable names
  if(variable == "o2-bot"){
    variable = "o2"
  }
  if(variable == "ph-bot"){
    variable = "ph"
  }
  
  if(variable == "so-bot"){
    variable = "so"
  }
  
  nc <- nc_open(input_file)
  
  lon  <- ncvar_get(nc, "lon")
  lat  <- ncvar_get(nc, "lat")
  time <- ncvar_get(nc, "time")
  
  # ---- Convert time to years (months since origin) ----
  origin_year <- as.integer(sub(
    ".*since ([0-9]{4}).*", "\\1", nc$dim$time$units
  ))
  
  years  <- origin_year + floor(time / 12)
  uyears <- sort(unique(years))
  
  # ---- Read variable ----
  var_array <- ncvar_get(nc, variable)
  
  # ---- Compute yearly means ----
  yearly_means <- array(
    NA_real_,
    dim = c(length(lon), length(lat), length(uyears))
  )
  
  for (i in seq_along(uyears)) {
    idx <- which(years == uyears[i])
    yearly_means[,,i] <- apply(
      var_array[,,idx], c(1,2),
      mean, na.rm = TRUE
    )
  }
  
  # ---- Get units from input if available ----
  var_units <- nc$var[[variable]]$units
  if (!is.null(units_override)) {
    var_units <- units_override
  }
  
  nc_close(nc)
  
  # ---- Create output NetCDF ----
  lon_dim  <- ncdim_def("lon",  "degrees_east",  lon)
  lat_dim  <- ncdim_def("lat",  "degrees_north", lat)
  year_dim <- ncdim_def("year", "year",          uyears)
  
  var_def <- ncvar_def(
    name = variable,
    units = var_units,
    dim = list(lon_dim, lat_dim, year_dim),
    missval = -999,
    prec = "float"
  )
  
  nc_out <- nc_create(output_file, vars = list(var_def))
  ncvar_put(nc_out, var_def, yearly_means)
  nc_close(nc_out)
  
  message("Yearly NetCDF written:\n", output_file)
  
  invisible(output_file)
}


# monthly_to_yearly_nc(
#   base_dir = "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300",
#   model    = "ipsl-cm6a-lr",
#   scenario = "ssp126",
#   variable = "tos",
#   ensemble = "r1i1p1f1",
#   resolution = "30arcmin",
#   period = "2101_2300"
# )


```

## Run function for all variables

```{r}

variables <- c(
  # "tos",
  # "tob","o2-bot","o2-surf","ph-bot","ph-surf", "siconc",
  # "so-bot","so-surf"
  "intpp","intppdiat"
)

# lapply over variables
lapply(variables, function(var) {
  monthly_to_yearly_nc(
    base_dir = "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300",
    model    = "ipsl-cm6a-lr",
    scenario = "ssp126",
    variable = var,
    ensemble = "r1i1p1f1",
    resolution = "30arcmin",
    period = "2101_2300"
  )
})


```


## Check output file


## Test data

Make sure the 1851 to 2100 and 2101 to 2300 data line up

```{r}


# Open the yearly NetCDF file

check_climate <- function(
    var_name,
    model = "ipsl-cm6a-lr",
    scenario = "ssp126"){
  
  variable_name <- ifelse(var_name %in% c("o2-bot", "ph-bot", "so-bot"), 
                   gsub("-bot$", "", var_name), var_name)
  
  
  
  nc <- nc_open(
    paste0("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/",model,"/",scenario,"/yearly/",model,"_r1i1p1f1_",scenario,"_",var_name,"_30arcmin_global_yearly_2101_2300.nc")
  )
  
  # Read variables
  variable <- ncvar_get(nc, variable_name)   # lon x lat x year
  years <- ncvar_get(nc, "year")
  
  nc_close(nc)
  
  # Compute global mean for each year
  global_mean <- apply(variable, 3, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  
  # transform global_mean to df
  df_f <- data.frame(
    year = years,
    variable = global_mean
  )
  
  
  nc_hist <- nc_open(
    paste0("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/",model,"/",scenario,"/yearly/",model,"_r1i1p1f1_",scenario,"_",var_name,"_30arcmin_global_yearly_2015_2100.nc")
  )
  
  # Read variables
  years_h <- ncvar_get(nc_hist, "year")
  variable_h <- ncvar_get(nc_hist, variable_name)   # lon x lat x year
  
  nc_close(nc_hist)
  
  # Compute global mean for each year
  global_mean_h <- apply(variable_h, 3, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  
  # transform global_mean to df
  df_h <- data.frame(
    year = years_h,
    variable = global_mean_h
  )
  
  nc_pi <- nc_open(
    paste0("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/",model,"/historical/yearly/",model,"_r1i1p1f1_historical_",var_name,"_30arcmin_global_yearly_1850_2014.nc")
  )
  
  # Read variables
  years_pi <- ncvar_get(nc_pi, "year")
  variable_pi <- ncvar_get(nc_pi, variable_name)   # lon x lat x year
  
  nc_close(nc_pi)
  
  # Compute global mean for each year
  global_mean_pi <- apply(variable_pi, 3, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  
  # transform global_mean to df
  df_pi <- data.frame(
    year = years_pi,
    variable = global_mean_pi
  )
  
  
  tidy_df <- bind_rows(df_f,df_h,df_pi)
  
  plot <-
    tidy_df %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x=year,y=variable))+
    geom_line()
  
  plot_name <- paste0("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/",model,"/y_figures/",var_name,"_1850_2300.png")
  
  ggsave(
    filename = plot_name,
    plot = plot,
    width = 8,
    height = 5
  )
  
}

# check_climate(
#   var_name = "tob",
#   model = "ipsl-cm6a-lr",
#   scenario = "ssp126"
# )

variables <- c(
  # "tos",
  # "tob","o2-bot","o2-surf","ph-bot","ph-surf", "siconc",
  # "so-bot","so-surf"
  # "intpp","intppdiat"
)

lapply(variables, check_climate, model = "ipsl-cm6a-lr",scenario = "ssp126")

```

# Joint year data 

```{r}

merge_early_late_nc <- function(path_early, path_late,path_future,out_dir) {
  
  # --- Open both files ---
  nc_early <- nc_open(path_early)
  nc_late  <- nc_open(path_late)
  nc_future <- nc_open(path_future)
  
  # --- Read spatial coords (lon, lat) ---
  lon       <- ncvar_get(nc_early, "lon")
  lat       <- ncvar_get(nc_early, "lat")
  
  # --- Get the variable name (the 3D epi variable) ---
  varname <- setdiff(names(nc_early$var), c("lon", "lat", "time_var"))[[1]]
  if (is.null(varname)) stop("No suitable 3D variable found in ", path_early)
  
  # --- Read data for this variable ---
  data_early <- ncvar_get(nc_early, varname)  # 720 x 360 x 97
  data_late  <- ncvar_get(nc_late,  varname)  # 720 x 360 x 203
  data_future  <- ncvar_get(nc_future,  varname)  # 720 x 360 x 203
  
  # --- Concatenate along time (3rd dim) ---
  data_full  <- abind(data_early, data_late, data_future, along = 3)
  
  # --- Time vector: 1850–2300 annual (400 years) ---
  time_full  <- 1850:2300
  
  if (length(time_full) != dim(data_full)[3]) {
    stop("Time length mismatch: 1850–2300 (300) vs data dimension (",
         dim(data_full)[3], ") for ", varname)
  }
  
  # --- Define dimensions (using the repaired 300‑year time) ---
  dim_lon  <- ncdim_def("lon",      "degrees_east",  lon,  create_dimvar = TRUE)
  dim_lat  <- ncdim_def("lat",      "degrees_north", lat,  create_dimvar = TRUE)
  dim_time <- ncdim_def("time_dim", "time_steps", time_full, unlim = TRUE, create_dimvar = TRUE)
  
  # --- Define variables (same varname as input) ---
  var_data <- ncvar_def(
    varname, "merged", list(dim_lon, dim_lat, dim_time), -9999, prec = "double"
  )
  var_time <- ncvar_def(
    "time_var", "yyyy", list(dim_time), NULL, prec = "float"
  )
  
  # --- Output path with variable name ---
  basename_early <- basename(path_early)
  outname <- gsub("_30arcmin_global_yearly_1850_2014.nc", "_yearly_1850_2300_05x05.nc",
                  basename_early, fixed = TRUE)
  outname <- gsub("_historical_", "_",
                  outname, fixed = TRUE)
  outname <- gsub("^", "merged_", outname, fixed = TRUE)
  path_merged <- file.path(out_dir, outname)
  
  # --- Create and write merged file ---
  ncid <- nc_create(path_merged, list(var_time, var_data))
  ncvar_put(ncid, "lon",       lon)
  ncvar_put(ncid, "lat",       lat)
  ncvar_put(ncid, "time_var",  time_full)
  ncvar_put(ncid, varname,     data_full)
  
  # --- Copy global attributes from early file ---
  gatts_early <- ncatt_get(nc_early, 0)
  for(nm in names(gatts_early)) {
    ncatt_put(ncid, 0, nm, gatts_early[[nm]])
  }
  
  nc_close(nc_early)
  nc_close(nc_late)
  nc_close(ncid)
  
  cat("Merged:", path_merged, "\n")
}

```



```{r}

path_early <- list.files(
  "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/historical/yearly/",
  pattern = ".nc", full.names = TRUE
)

path_late <- list.files(
  "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/ssp126/yearly/",
  pattern = "_2015_2100.nc", full.names = TRUE
)

path_future <- list.files(
  "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/ssp126/yearly/",
  pattern = "_2101_2300.nc", full.names = TRUE
)

# --- Match by variable name ---
early_basenames <- basename(path_early)
late_basenames  <- basename(path_late)
future_basenames  <- basename(path_future)

early_vars <- gsub("_30arcmin_global_yearly_1850_2014.nc$", "", early_basenames)
late_vars  <- gsub("_30arcmin_global_yearly_2015_2100.nc$",  "", late_basenames)
future_vars  <- gsub("_30arcmin_global_yearly_2101_2300.nc$",  "", future_basenames)


order_early <- order(early_vars)
order_late  <- order(late_vars)
order_future <- order(future_vars)

path_early <- path_early[order_early]
path_late  <- path_late[order_late]
path_future  <- path_future[order_future]

out_dir <- "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# merge_early_late_nc(path_early[i], path_late[i], path_future[i], out_dir)



# for (i in seq_along(path_early)) {
for (i in 1:2) {
  merge_early_late_nc(path_early[i], path_late[i], path_future[i], out_dir)
}


```

## Test joint

```{r}


test_plot <-function(path_merged){
  
  nc <- nc_open("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined/ipsl-cm6a-lr_r1i1p1f1_totalphy2_yearly_1850_2300_05x05.nc")
  if(nc$nvars == 2){
  var_name <- nc$var[[2]]$name
  }else{
    var_name <- nc$var[[1]]$name
  }
  
  pH   <- ncvar_get(nc, var_name)   # 720 x 360 x 300
  time <- ncvar_get(nc, "year") # 300‑element vector
  
  nc_close(nc)
  
  # --- Compute global mean over space at each time ---
  pH_mean <- apply(pH, 3, function(tt) mean(tt, na.rm = TRUE))  # time‑slice means
  
  # --- Make a data frame ---
  df <- data.frame(
    year = time,                 # assuming your "yyyy" is just numeric year
    pH   = pH_mean
  )
  
  # --- Optional: remove missing values ---
  df <- df[!is.na(df$pH), ]
  
  # --- Fit linear trend ---
  fit <- lm(pH ~ year, data = df)
  
  # --- Plot with trend line ---
  ggplot(df, aes(x = year, y = pH)) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red", linetype = 2) +
    labs(
      title = "Global mean variable (1850–2300)",
      x = "Year",
      y = "pH"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(1850, 2300),
      breaks = seq(1850, 2300, by = 50)
      ) # format y-axis with commas
  
  ggsave(
    last_plot(),
    filename = paste0("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined/0_plots/", var_name, "_global_mean_trend.jpg"),
         width = 8, height = 5)
  
}

path_list <- list.files("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined",pattern = ".nc",full.names = T)


# test_plot(path_list[1])

lapply(path_list, test_plot)
```

# Transform totaplhy2 

```{r}

# Calculates totalphy2 based on available phytoplankton size classes from different ESMs

  # Read diatom production data
  diat_nc <- nc_open("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined/ipsl-cm6a-lr_r1i1p1f1_intppdiat_yearly_1850_2300_05x05.nc")

    npp_nc <- nc_open("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined/ipsl-cm6a-lr_r1i1p1f1_intpp_yearly_1850_2300_05x05.nc")
    
diat <- ncvar_get(diat_nc, "intppdiat")
npp  <- ncvar_get(npp_nc,  "intpp")

lon <- ncvar_get(diat_nc, "lon")
lat <- ncvar_get(diat_nc, "lat")
year <- ncvar_get(diat_nc, "time_dim")

nc_close(diat_nc)
nc_close(npp_nc)

diaz <- npp - diat
totalphy2 <- diaz * 0.1 + diat
totalphy2[totalphy2 < -9999] <- -9999  

lon_dim <- ncdim_def("lon", "degrees_east", lon)
lat_dim <- ncdim_def("lat", "degrees_north", lat)
year_dim <- ncdim_def("time_dim", "year", year, unlim = FALSE)

missval <- -9999
phy_var <- ncvar_def(
  name = "totalphy2",
  units = "mmol N m-2 d-1",
  dim = list(lon_dim, lat_dim, year_dim),
  missval = missval,
  longname = "Total phytoplankton production from diat and diaz"
)

out_file <- "/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined/ipsl-cm6a-lr_r1i1p1f1_totalphy2_yearly_1850_2300_05x05.nc"
nc_out <- nc_create(out_file, phy_var)

ncvar_put(nc_out, phy_var, totalphy2)

ncatt_put(nc_out, 0, "source", "Derived from intppdiat and intpp")
ncatt_put(nc_out, 0, "history", paste("Created", Sys.time()))

nc_close(nc_out)

test_plot("/Volumes/Enterprise/Data/FishMip/fishmip_2300/ipsl-cm6a-lr/combined/ipsl-cm6a-lr_r1i1p1f1_totalphy2_yearly_1850_2300_05x05.nc")
  
```
